title: AlphaGo Defeats European Champion
description: DeepMind's AlphaGo defeated European Go champion Fan Hui 5-0 in a formal match, the first time a computer program defeated a professional Go player. This was a landmark achievement as Go was considered much more complex than chess.
highlights: First AI to defeat professional Go player
Combined deep neural networks with Monte Carlo tree search
Trained on 30 million positions from human games
Paved way for Lee Sedol match
